---
name: Missing feature layer idea
about: Suggest a live-safe feature or test design for continuation vs exhaustion classification
title: "Feature idea: <name>"
labels: research, feature-idea
assignees: ""
---

## Hypothesis

What do you think separates continuation from exhaustion?

## Feature definition

Describe the proposed feature as concretely as possible.

## Required data

What fields are needed?

## Decision-time availability

Can this be computed at the decision timestamp without using future bars or outcome data?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Unsure

## Leakage risk

Where could future leakage sneak in?

## Expected behavior

What should the feature do when the move is likely continuation vs exhaustion?

## Test design

How should this be tested with train / validation / out-of-sample separation?

## Falsification

What result would prove this idea is not useful?

## Implementation difficulty

Low / medium / high, and why.
